title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Authentication is not completed; user remains unauthenticated.

title: EP: 2FA verify with invalid TOTP blocks authentication
precondition: User has logged in with valid credentials, 2FA is enabled, and is on the TOTP verification page
test_steps:
Navigate to TOTP verification page
Enter an invalid TOTP code (e.g., '000000')
Submit the code
expected_result: Authentication fails, error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid code'), user remains on verification page

title: EP: 2FA verify with valid TOTP completes authentication
precondition: User has logged in with valid credentials, 2FA is enabled, and is on the TOTP verification page
test_steps:
Navigate to TOTP verification page
Enter a valid TOTP code generated from the shared secret
Submit the code
expected_result: Authentication succeeds, user is logged in and redirected to the dashboard

title: DT: TOTP incorrect (Rule 1) blocks authentication
precondition: User has logged in with valid credentials, 2FA is enabled, and is on the TOTP verification page
test_steps:
Navigate to TOTP verification page
Enter an incorrect TOTP code
Submit the code
test_data: TOTP code that does not match: 000000
expected_result: System does not authenticate; appropriate error message shown
